title: Paraprasophyllum suttonii
taxonomy: Paraprasophyllum suttonii is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is native to Australia and is a terrestrial orchid. Paraprasophyllum suttonii is classified as a genus within the subtribe Pterostylidinae and tribe Diurideae. The classification of this orchid is further divided into the family Orchidaceae, which is one of the two main families of orchids. Paraprasophyllum suttonii is a small, terrestrial orchid with a distinctive habit and appearance.
